Name: FOOT_EFFECT_WATER_SFX_PARAM
Description: Defines water-related footstep SFX variations based on movement type, speed, and body immersion depth.

Fields.Name: Ankle Depth (Idle)
Fields.Description: SFX played when standing still in water at ankle depth.

Fields.Name: Knee Depth (Idle)
Fields.Description: SFX played when standing still in water at knee/thigh depth.

Fields.Name: Waist Depth (Idle)
Fields.Description: SFX played when standing still in water at waist depth.

Fields.Name: Ankle Depth (Slow Movement)
Fields.Description: SFX for slow movement through shallow water.

Fields.Name: Knee Depth (Slow Movement)
Fields.Description: SFX for slow movement through mid-depth water.

Fields.Name: Waist Depth (Slow Movement)
Fields.Description: SFX for slow movement through deep water.

Fields.Name: Ankle Depth (Normal Movement)
Fields.Description: SFX for normal movement through shallow water.

Fields.Name: Knee Depth (Normal Movement)
Fields.Description: SFX for normal movement through mid-depth water.

Fields.Name: Waist Depth (Normal Movement)
Fields.Description: SFX for normal movement through deep water.

Fields.Name: Ankle Depth (Fast Movement)
Fields.Description: SFX for fast movement through shallow water.

Fields.Name: Knee Depth (Fast Movement)
Fields.Description: SFX for fast movement through mid-depth water.

Fields.Name: Waist Depth (Fast Movement)
Fields.Description: SFX for fast movement through deep water.

Fields.Name: Ankle Step
Fields.Description: SFX triggered by stepping in shallow water.

Fields.Name: Knee Step
Fields.Description: SFX triggered by stepping in mid-depth water.

Fields.Name: Waist Step
Fields.Description: SFX triggered by stepping in deep water.

Fields.Name: Ankle Roll
Fields.Description: SFX triggered when rolling or dodging in shallow water.

Fields.Name: Knee Roll
Fields.Description: SFX triggered when rolling or dodging in mid-depth water.

Fields.Name: Waist Roll
Fields.Description: SFX triggered when rolling or dodging in deep water.

Fields.Name: Ankle Jump
Fields.Description: SFX triggered when jumping in shallow water.

Fields.Name: Knee Jump
Fields.Description: SFX triggered when jumping in mid-depth water.

Fields.Name: Waist Jump
Fields.Description: SFX triggered when jumping in deep water.
